text.title: kb-codebase-rag-symbol-chunked Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for kb-codebase-rag-symbol-chunked as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Embedding raw 1024-char windows because the RAG starter kit defaults to it.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The default exists to make demos work on arbitrary text; on code it actively misleads the agent and inflates retrieval cost (more chunks, lower per-chunk signal).

failure-mode.description: Letting the agent issue raw vector queries against the store directly.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Couples agent prompts to the vector backend; swapping engines (or upgrading the embedding model) becomes a multi-prompt rewrite. The MCP tool boundary keeps the agent contract stable.
